lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Greetings! Have you come to gaze in rapture at the natural beauty of Falador's parkland?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um, yes, very nice. Lots of... trees and stuff.

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Trees! I do so love trees! And flowers! And squirrels!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I have a strange urge to be somewhere else.

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Come back to me soon and we can talk again about trees!

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Thank you, I love that song!

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Have you come to play music to me?

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Select the song I asked you to play, and speak to me again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm not interested in that.

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Then you must have come to gaze in rapture at the natural beauty of Falador's parkland!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um, yes, very nice. Lots of... trees and stuff.

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Trees! I do so love trees! And flowers! And squirrels!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I have a strange urge to be somewhere else.

lines.speaker: Cecilia
lines.text: Come back to me soon and we can talk again about trees!
